description:
A screenshot of a software interface displaying the "Output Classes" configuration section within the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CLC+ Core User Manual. The interface features a table for defining output classes with the following columns: "Code", "Name", "Class Condition (Rule)", "Colour", and "Display in Map".

Two example output classes are shown:
1.  **Code:** "1", **Name:** "Woodland stands", **Class Condition (Rule):** "LC_NAME == 'Woodland stands'", **Colour:** (green colour swatch), **Display in Map:** (checked checkbox).
2.  **Code:** "2", **Name:** "Unmanaged woodland", **Class Condition (Rule):** "LC_NAME == 'Unmanaged woodland'", **Colour:** (darker green colour swatch), **Display in Map:** (checked checkbox).

To the right of the "Output Classes" section title, there is an icon (plus sign) to add new output classes. Below the table, there are two buttons: "Add new Output Class" (with a plus icon) and "Delete selected Output Class" (with a minus icon).
